name: Banister impulse–response model
description: Fitness–fatigue dynamics from training impulse and decay constants.

name: Foster session load & monotony
description: TRIMP-like load, monotony, strain for internal training load.

name: perf-lab unified S(t) twin
description: Empirical fatigue, tissue, and capacity coupling in this codebase.

name: High-frequency classical lift emphasis
description: Frequent competition lifts, technique-first, controlled volume.

name: Aerobic base & threshold layering
description: Majority low intensity; threshold and VO2 work layered, fatigue via volume.

name: Volume-first periodization bias
description: High submax volume, specificity waves — not a copy of any program sheet.

name: RPE-based autoregulation
description: Intra-session load adjustment from perceived exertion.

name: Skill progression gating
description: No skipping progressions; tendon and wrist stress managed gradually.

name: Grip: tendon slower than muscle
description: Limit high-frequency max crush/pinch; submax holds for volume.
